results.title: Claude search
results.content: {"results": [{"title": "SOC 2 Type 2 Compliance Guide 2025", "content": "SOC 2 is an audit standard by AICPA evaluating security, availability, processing integrity, confidentiality, and privacy of service organizations. SOC 2 Type 2 assesses control effectiveness over 6-12 months and is the gold standard for cloud service providers. Five Trust Services Criteria: Security (mandatory), Availability, Privacy, Confidentiality, Processing Integrity. Key controls include MFA, RBAC, AES-256 encryption, vulnerability management, and IDS. Annual audits required by independent CPA firms.", "url": "https://www.ibm.com/cloud/compliance/soc-2"}, {"title": "ISO/IEC 27001:2022 - Major Changes & 2025 Compliance Deadline", "content": "ISO/IEC 27001:2022 published October 2022 replaces 2013 version. All ISO 27001:2013 certifications must transition by October 25, 2025. Key changes: Control structure reorganized from 14 domains to 4 themes (Organizational, People, Physical, Technical controls); controls
